articles.title: Correa’s 3-run blast powers the Astros past the Red Sox 6-4 for a sweep
articles.description:
Carlos Correa put Houston on top with a three-run homer and Christian Vázquez added a solo shot to lead the Astros to a 6-4 win over the Boston Red Sox to complete a three-game sweep.

The post Correa’s 3-run blast powers the Astros past the Red Sox 6-4 for a sweep appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Astros defeated Red Sox 6-4, completing a three-game sweep on April 1.
Carlos Correa hit a decisive three-run homer, impacting Boston's season outlook.
Red Sox fans face disappointment as team struggles against strong opponents.

articles.title: For this Everett runner, the Boston Marathon has always been personal
articles.description:
Inspired by memories of the 2013 bombings and the city’s response, Michelle Davidson is running with the Brigham Stepping Strong Foundation to support trauma care.

The post For this Everett runner, the Boston Marathon has always been personal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Everett runner Michelle Davidson participates in the Boston Marathon to honor 2013 bombing victims.
She supports trauma care through the Brigham Stepping Strong Foundation during the April 2026 marathon.
Davidson's efforts highlight community resilience and the ongoing need for trauma support in Boston.

articles.title: Boston faces budget deficit of nearly $50 million
articles.description:
City officials said that the costs of snow removal, police overtime, and health insurance were major factors.

The post Boston faces budget deficit of nearly $50 million appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston faces a budget deficit of nearly $50 million as of April 2026.
Major factors include snow removal costs, police overtime, and health insurance expenses.
City officials may need to cut services or increase taxes to address the deficit.
